title: Simply Tea!
description: Find tea trees in the wild, boil water, then brew some tea.
body:
![Tree](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/T5Jqatse/images/61674a56e56d3b23c1ccabe53c13887da72da539.jpeg)

A simple tea mod made for /u/Pickles256 on Reddit!

Current features:

* Tea trees that spawn in your world!
* Teapots that you can fill with water and boil!
* Six types of tea: green, black, chai, floral, chamomile, and chorus; with different effects!
* Hot chocolate for the non-tea lovers.
* More information can be found on the [GitHub Wiki](https://github.com/elucent/SimplyTea/wiki), or you can view [Elucent's original (outdated) visual tutorial](https://imgur.com/a/CXkYu).

If you have any other questions, ask them in [KnightMiner's discord](https://discord.gg/njGrvuh), or to talk about other mods originally from Elucent on the [Mystic Modding discord](https://discord.gg/75aVV7C).
